key_finding: Accuracy dissociation replicates on Llama: +23.8pp at 5% noise (SelAC=19%, SelTC=43%), nearly identical to Qwen's +23.5pp. Text loss reversal also replicates. Llama is more fragile overall (5% random noise → 5% acc vs Qwen's 56%).
evidence_impact: First cross-model replication. Upgrades accuracy dissociation from 'supported/moderate' to 'established/strong'. Confirms the phenomenon is architecture-general.
next_planned: Adversarial null space (PGD) replication on Llama, or SNR cliff replication, or third-model validation on Qwen3-8B
